title: meow pack
description: This resource pack is suitable for Cart PvP and is very good in Crystal PvP because it has a small fire and it changes the GUI of the inventory, making PvP much lighter
body: This resource pack is very good for PvP, especially it helps in modes such as: UHC, Crystal and many other PvP modes, also the resource pack makes the fire smaller and changes the GUI making the game more enjoyable for PvP
